newFeatures.title: Stream Processor v0.6.3
description: The new version `v0.6.3` of the _Stream Processor_ is available!

This version introduces configurable [Custom Partitioner](/docs/14.6.0/products/fast_data_v2/stream_processor/usage#custom-partitioner) support for the Kafka producer, including the new `lowerHalf` and `upperHalf` partition selection values.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/14.6.0/products/fast_data_v2/stream_processor/changelog) for the full list of changes.

improvements.title: Fast Data Control Plane v2 Application
description: The new versions of Fast Data Control Plane v2 services are available: `v0.2.0-mongodb` (and `v0.2.0`) of the _Control Plane_ service, and `v0.2.0` of the _Control Plane Frontend_ service.
- Pipeline specs can now carry Stream Processor producer configuration
- Feedbacks from multiple replicas of the same service are merged
- Desired states management has been improved supporting the case in which consumer group for a workload changes
On the frontend side, a badge now shows the consumer group working status. Partition Settings are surfaced in the Process execution step drawer, and a warning icon highlights missing partition info.
For more information about service latest versions, check out the [compatibility matrix](/docs/14.6.0/products/fast_data_v2/runtime_management/compatibility_matrix#service-latest-versions).

improvements.title: Farm Data v0.6.2
description: The new version `v0.6.2` of _Farm Data_ is available with dependency updates.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/14.6.0/products/fast_data_v2/farm_data/changelog) for the full list of changes.

improvements.title: Kango v0.6.2
description: The new version `v0.6.2` of _Kango_ is available with build and CI pipeline fixes.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/14.6.0/products/fast_data_v2/kango/changelog) for the full list of changes.
